title: cattleya × fowleri
intro: Cattleya × fowleri, also known as the Fowl's Cattleya, is a hybrid orchid plant that combines the Cattleya warscewiczii and Cattleya lueddemanniana species. The Cattleya × fowleri plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although proper identification and handling are crucial due to potential toxicity and allergenicity.
